data.title: Ocean Depths
data.description: Descending into the blue to reveal a hidden world. Shot across coral reefs in Southeast Asia and the open Atlantic, this series captures the otherworldly textures, colors, and creatures that exist just beneath the surface — a reminder of how much beauty lies unseen.

images.alt: Sunlight filtering through crystal-clear ocean water
Vibrant coral reef teeming with tropical fish
Sea turtle gliding through deep blue water
Abstract patterns of light on the ocean floor
